emails.body: Mark- our fears came true on this. Well got "stuck" and costs will escalate substantially. Now is necessary to sidetrack. Did your guys find anything on this? Rick Forwarded by Rick Buy/HOU/ECT on 11/21/2000 11:17 AM From: Rick Buy 11/01/2000 01:13 PM
